office_does: The auditor administers elections, records, licensing, and county financial functions.
race_blurb: Three candidates emphasize different combinations of transparency, modernization, and professional preparation.

candidates.summary: Corbin is a former local party leader campaigning on election audits, open financial records, and transparency.
highlights: Supports auditing election results and opening county financial records [S2].

spending.basis: Opening financial records and auditing results supply an oversight direction.

experience.basis: He has organizational leadership but no documented auditor-office or elected record.

candidates.summary: Townsend is a former local party chair emphasizing modernization, accountability, transparency, and leadership development.

spending.basis: Accountability and transparency supply an oversight direction.

experience.basis: He has organizational leadership but no documented auditor-office record.

candidates.summary: Merrill is a CPA candidate whose campaign centers on honest administration without a detailed platform.
highlights: Campaign identifies accounting preparation and honest administration [S2].

experience.basis: CPA preparation is relevant, but no auditor-office or elected record is documented.
